Welcome to KALPANA’S KITCHEN

The best Authentic Indian Spicest available in California
Order online at kalpana@kalpanaskitchen.com

PreviousNext
1234

Amazing meals from Authentic Spices

Getting your food more taste!

Kalpana’s Hand-pounded Spices remind you of Mother’s cooking!

“Cooking, healthy, nutritious and delicious food is my lifelong passion. I try to find the best ingredients for my teachers, husband, children, grandkids, siblings, nephews, nieces, friends. In general, it gives me great joy to experiment, cook and feed.

One thing I really found missing here is authentic and aromatic spices. Right spices are the foundation for great food. I always brought my spices from India. Or made my own spices at home.

When I discovered these spices –I found them to be honest, aromatic and authentic. I had several people try them out. They felt the same.

The first batch was sold out. Honestly, I thought it is a passion and hence just fun.

But it does not work that way. It is a lot of work. However, it is combined with passion and the satisfaction of providing great spices.

If we can chase gourmet olives, gourmet hummus, gourmet cheeses, this is the least we can do to get honest spices- every which way. These prices are way, way better than any organic spices I have come across.

If you have a group of five people who want to order together, it can be faster. Single order is perfectly welcome.

Included:

  1. Haldi powder (Turmeric)
  2. Kashmiri Red Chilli
  3. Reshampatti Chilli powder
  4. Dhania-Jira powder
  5. Garam Masala
  6. Chaat Masala
  7. Chai(Tea) Masala
  8. Amchur powder
  9. Pickle powder
  10. Dhania powder
  11. Jeera powder

I AM READY TO ORDER THE NEXT SHIPMENT. IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO ORDER, PLEASE SEND ME A MESSAGE ON MESSENGER or email at kalpana@kalpanaskitchen.com

Looking forward to adding spice to your cooking!
